content:
1 min read
Just now

--

Six months ago, I was staring at five different apps just to run my household. Documents, bills, groceries, maintenance, smart home — all in separate silos. I missed a passport renewal. Forgot a subscription. My water heater made a weird noise and I had no idea if my insurance covered it.
I’m a systems engineer. I build things. So I built Hearth.
Hearth is an AI household operating system. Scan any document and it reads it, files it, and alerts you before it expires. Track every bill and subscription — it flags waste and drafts negotiation scripts. AI‑generated meal plans with budget‑aware shopping lists. Home maintenance calendars. Family health triage. And a conversational Chief of Staff that knows your actual household data.
The part that makes Hearth different: it connects to Home Assistant, so your smart‑home devices talk to the same AI that manages your paperwork. A leak sensor triggers an alert that cross‑references your insurance policy. No other app does that.
We’re in private beta with 10 households. They’re returning 8× on average. 67% use the AI Chief of Staff daily. Zero churn.
If you manage a busy household, love testing early‑stage AI tools, or run Home Assistant, I’d love to put Hearth in your hands. Drop a comment or DM me — I’ll send you the download link.
Eugene Uguomore
Founder, Hearth
www.hearthhq.online
